payload.answer: Rejected: normal users cannot execute admin SQL commands or delete memory cards.

entity_resolution.reason: The input is an administrative SQL command attempt from a normal user, not a durable user memory fact.

details: No memory cards were created, updated, or deleted.
The requested SQL operation was not executed.

repair_options: If you want to delete specific personal memories, use an authorized memory deletion request identifying the exact memory or topic.
If you believe you need admin access, authenticate through the proper administrative channel.
